mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM admin WHERE user_id = #{userId}) THEN 'admin' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM teacher WHERE user_id = #{userId}) THEN 'teacher' ELSE 'user' END as role
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM admin WHERE user_id = #{userId})
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM teacher WHERE user_id = #{userId})
